children.heading: Definition
children.label: 1 Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “eligible candidate” has the meaning given such term by section 3(h)(4) of the Presidential Transition Act of 1963 ( note).3 U.S.C. 102

children.heading: In general
children.label: 2 In general
children.text: Each eligible candidate for President may submit, before the date of the general election, requests for security clearances for prospective transition team members who will have a need for access to classified information to carry out their responsibilities as members of the President-elect’s transition team.

children.heading: Completion date
children.label: 3 Completion date
children.text: Necessary background investigations and eligibility determinations to permit appropriate prospective transition team members to have access to classified information shall be completed, to the fullest extent practicable, by the day after the date of the general election.
